reviews.title: Good deal
reviews.text: Works great. I've had it for a couple of months and it's been great.
reviews.author: CoryB

reviews.title: This Baby Booms!!…XL
reviews.text: This little speaker was great! It had a nice big sound for how little it was. I use past tense here because it finally met its end after a few years… But I was pretty rough on this thing! I had it sitting in the shower with me and it had so much bass it would slide off and smack onto the shower floor. But time and time again I would just pop the front grating back on and it would keep chugging. I think it just had a few too many drops and maybe got a little too wet and pooped out on me. Great speaker for the price though!
reviews.author: BrandonE

reviews.title: Did not last

reviews.title: Good speaker with lightweight and powerful bass.
reviews.text: This mighty speaker is lightweight, very portable and powerful, Sounds was clear and loud enough to satisfy media consumption. It is waterproof and has 4 hours of battery life on full charge and also has good wireless range. It can fill entire small-moderate room to enjoy the music and sound for all the people. I got this on deal and use it with my laptop for which sound is almost low. So, I can use it with my laptop at least to fulfill my work.

reviews.title: Lousy Battery Time.
reviews.text:
These would be 5 star speakers!
But for the battery time!
They are supposed to last six hours!
Together,  if you’re lucky it’s 3 by themselves 3 1/2!
Other than that the set up is easy and they were great as stereo but my set will be returned!

reviews.title: Good speaker
reviews.text:
Was hesitant on buying this since it was super cheap.
But loving it, sounds great.
Only 2 bad things that it has are:
- When you connect it to your phone to  play, the volume is really loud, you have to turn it down right away. Don't know why it turns the volume super high when connected.

- Second, it doesn't play music once the battery reaches 20%. I find it odd why it would remain on, but won't play once at 20%.
